data.title: Medical Technology Associates Announces Acquisition of Stat Biomedical, LLC, Expanding Biomedical Equipment Services
data.description: Medical Technology Associates, LLC, known as MTA, has recently acquired Stat Biomedical, LLC, enhancing MTA's biomedical equipment service offerings. This strategic move, announced on April 16, 2026, from PINELLAS PARK in Florida, underscores MTA's commitment to expanding its capabilities in the sector. The acquisition will enable MTA to provide services to a wider client base and increase its reach in the industry. This development marks a significant milestone for MTA as it continues to solidify its position in the market.

data.title: FlexCare's Chief Client Officer Ryan White Appointed to NATHO Board of Directors
data.description: White's appointment to the NATHO Board provides valuable frontline workforce perspective, enhancing industry standards and guiding the future of travel healthcare solutions. Based in Roseville, California, FlexCare is a prominent player in travel nursing and allied health sectors. The news was announced on April 16, 2026, through a PRWeb press release.

data.title: Village Dental to Offer Free Dental Care for Raleigh-Area Residents on May 2
data.description: "An event called 'Smiles From the Heart 2026' is set to offer complimentary dental services to underserved individuals and families in need. Taking place in Raleigh, North Carolina on April 16, 2026, Village Dental will host this initiative on May 2. The event will provide free dental care, including cleanings, to those in need."

data.title: Scispot Launches Trust Vault to Make Regulated Lab Compliance Continuous and Inspection‑Ready
data.description: Trust Vault is providing life science laboratories with a centralized platform to monitor essential records, approvals, and system modifications, ensuring seamless compliance processes and preparedness for audits. Based in Kitchener, ON, as of April 16, 2026, Scispot, the lab operating system powered by artificial intelligence designed for contemporary life science groups, announced its latest offering.

data.title: myFootpath Expands Research with New White Paper on Budgetary Models and Leadership Dynamics
data.description: In a recent publication, a white paper authored by Dr. Don Hossler, Dr. Luke Schultheis, and J.T. Allen delves into the impact of budgetary models and leadership dynamics on online enrollment for adult learners. The paper, titled "Budgetary Models and Leadership Dynamics in Online Enrollment," examines key structural and financial elements that play a crucial role in the academic success of adult learners in online programs. This research builds upon existing studies in the field and sheds light on how these factors significantly influence the outcomes of online education for adult learners.

data.title: The Office Gurus expands U.S. onshore and nearshore outsourcing capabilities
data.description: Today, The Office Gurus (TOG), a leading provider of onshore and nearshore outsourcing and customer experience (CX) solutions worldwide, announced enhanced offerings intended to assist American businesses in expanding their customer support, sales operations, and back-office services. The update aims to facilitate scaling while upholding exceptional quality standards.

data.title: Project 61 Launches New FUEL Feature in App to Help Truck Drivers Build Better Nutrition Habits
data.description: Project 61 has recently introduced FUEL, a new in-app tool that prioritizes drivers' nutrition consistency within the 5 Axles of Health™ framework. This initiative aims to assist truck drivers in adopting healthier eating habits. The tool was launched in Carmel, Indiana, on April 16, 2026. Through FUEL, drivers can access a user-friendly platform that supports their dietary needs while on the road, contributing to overall well-being.

data.title: FST Technical Services Acquires Blue Sky Consulting Services to Expand Capabilities and Strengthen QA/QC and Testing Services
data.description: FST Technical Services has successfully acquired Blue Sky Consulting Services, a reputable company offering Quality Assurance/Quality Control (QA/QC) and Testing Services. This acquisition will further solidify FST's position as a top provider in the industry, enhancing its capabilities in delivering high-quality building performance solutions. This strategic move signifies a significant milestone for FST, as it aims to leverage Blue Sky's expertise and resources to expand its service offerings.

data.title: SecondBloom Auctions Launches 500+ Lot Online Liquidation of Eden Green Technology Vertical Farming Facility in Cleburne, Texas
data.description: Shortly after revealing a $40 million expansion plan, the machinery at Eden Green Technology's Cleburne, Texas vertical farming plant is now up for public auction. SecondBloom Auctions has initiated an online sale with over 500 lots available, including GE Arize LED grow lights and HortiMaX equipment.

data.title: Revcuity Launches to Help Brands Capture Untapped Revenue at the Point-of-Sale, Backed by FPG & ABRY Partners
data.description: Today, Frontline Performance Group (FPG) revealed the establishment of Revcuity, an independent consulting and training firm focused on aiding businesses in boosting revenue during transactions. The company is based in ORLANDO, Fla., and the news was disclosed on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $90,000 with whales absorbing 20 times the daily BTC supply in a month.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has reached the breakout phase of a traditional bullish reversal pattern and is currently aiming for a surge towards $90,000.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Factory Holdings/
data.description: A recent news announcement reveals that Factory Holdings has spearheaded a cultural capital investment of $4.7 million in Kalshi. This project has garnered support from various sectors including athletes, entertainers, executives, and family offices. The investment signifies the commitment of these stakeholders towards the development and growth of Kalshi.
